_README: OPERATOR SPEC TEMPLATE — NOT LOADED AT BOOT.
Mainnet (chain_id 8989) boots from the hardcoded GenesisConfig::mainnet()
preset in node/src/genesis.rs. This JSON is the human-readable spec that
captures the FULL tokenomics + ZUSD + AMM + burn + staking parameters that
the runtime preset implements. It is NOT in GenesisConfig schema (which
To activate operator-supplied genesis (e.g. with real validator BLS keys
generated via zbx-keygen on secure hardware), produce a SEPARATE file in
the GenesisConfig schema with keys { chain_id, timestamp, gas_limit,
validators[address] } and point chain.genesis_file at it in mainnet.toml.
validate_no_placeholders() will reject any address whose first 18 bytes
are all zero on chain_id 8989, so PLACEHOLDER_* literals here can never
accidentally reach a live mainnet boot.

allocations.comment: AMM genesis liquidity seed (13.33%) — ownerless, immutable, no admin

token_allocations._note: ZUSD pre-mint to admin/foundation — used to seed AMM pool at launch
token_allocations.comment: Admin pre-mint: 100,000,000 ZUSD for AMM ZBX/ZUSD pool seeding

token_allocations._note: ZUSD reserve for lending protocol liquidity
token_allocations.comment: Treasury ZUSD reserve: 5,000,000 ZUSD for lending/stability ops

zusd._note: ZUSD stablecoin configuration — minted by ZusdVault

admin_mint.comment: 100,000,000 ZUSD pre-minted to admin at genesis (no collateral required for genesis mint)

burn._note: Deflationary burn — 10% of every tx fee burned permanently until max cap reached
burn._max_burn_note: 75,000,000 ZBX max burn cap (50% of 150M total supply). Burning stops after this.

fee_distribution._note: How each transaction fee is split (basis points, total = 10000)

staking._min_validator_human: 100 ZBX minimum to become a validator

amm._note: ZBX AMM — fully decentralized, ownerless, immutable pool
amm._swap_fee_note: 0.30% swap fee — hardcoded, nobody can change it (not even admin)

swap_limits._note: Anti-whale protection — enforced at contract level, nobody can bypass
swap_limits._max_buy_human: 50,000 ZBX max per single swap transaction
swap_limits._max_sell_human: 50,000 ZBX max per single sell transaction
swap_limits._max_impact_note: Max 15% price impact per swap — tx reverts if slippage exceeds this
swap_limits._cooldown_note: No per-wallet cooldown (anti-whale handled by per-tx limit only)

access_control._note: No admin key, no multisig, no timelock — pure code-is-law. Limits are hardcoded.

deployment.renounce_tx: ownership renounced in deployment tx (constructor sets owner=address(0))
